mapper.select:
SELECT fp.`账期编号` AS periodId, fp.`账期编码` AS periodCode, fp.`年份` AS year, fp.`月份` AS month, DATE_FORMAT(DATE(CONCAT(fp.`年份`, '-', LPAD(fp.`月份`, 2, '0'), '-01')), '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(DATE(CONCAT(fp.`年份`, '-', LPAD(fp.`月份`, 2, '0'), '-01'))), '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, fp.`组织编号` AS organizationId, fo.`组织名称` AS organizationName, fp.`是否已结账` AS isSettled, fp.`结账时间` AS settlementTime, fp.`结账人编码` AS settlementUserId, emp.`员工姓名` AS createUserName, DATE_FORMAT(fp.`创建时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, DATE_FORMAT(fp.`更新时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updateTime FROM fund_period fp LEFT JOIN fund_organization fo ON fp.`组织编号` = fo.`组织编号` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE emp ON fp.`创建人编码` = emp.`员工编码`
AND fp.`组织编号` = #{query.organizationId}
AND fp.`年份` = #{query.year}
AND fp.`是否已结账` = #{query.isSettled}
AND fp.`账期编码` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.periodCode}, '%')
ORDER BY
fp.`账期编码`
fp.`年份`
fp.`月份`
fp.`是否已结账`
fp.`创建时间`
fp.`更新时间`
fp.`创建时间`
DESC
ASC
ORDER BY fp.`创建时间` DESC
SELECT DISTINCT fp.`年份` AS year FROM fund_period fp ORDER BY fp.`年份` DESC
